name: sample-team
goal: Produce one short haiku about autonomous agent teamwork. Boss: send the task to 'writer' via org_send, wait for the reply, then end your turn. Writer: write the haiku to the file out/haiku.md using the Write tool, then org_send the haiku text back to 'boss' and end your turn.

roles.title: Team Lead
responsibilities: Delegate the haiku task to writer via org_send
Acknowledge the result and end your turn

roles.title: Haiku Writer
responsibilities: Write a 3-line haiku about agent teamwork to out/haiku.md
Report the haiku back to boss via org_send
